text: The test drives 4 transactions, calls `assert_incremental_equals_full()` (the oracle) after each, asserts the emitted `Open`/`Close` commands, queries `why_resource_command`, and cross-checks with `trellis_testing::ResourceLedger` (`assert_resource_not_open`, `assert_all_resources_have_owner`). [...] - `graph.assert_incremental_equals_full()? -> FullRecomputeCheck` — the oracle; call after every meaningful tx in tests.
